channel.title: announcement on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in announcement on My Blog

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: Hello! This is my personal blog. 📸 Image Display You can insert images like this: Or use HTML: 📹 Video Embed YouTube Video <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen> </iframe> Bilibili Video <iframe src="//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BVID" scrolling="no" border="0" frameborder="no" width="100%" height="500"> </iframe> 🎵 Audio Embed <audio controls> <source src="/audio/podcast.mp3" type="audio/mpeg"> Your browser does not support audio. </audio> 🔗 Links External Link Internal Link You can easily edit content in the admin panel!
